## 📢 ANNOUNCEMENT DRAFT (Post this in GitHub Discussions -> Announcements)

**Title:** 🚀 Major Project Expansion: Building the "Killer Features" of RepoSage!

**Body:**
Hey everyone! 🎉

We are thrilled to announce a massive expansion to the RepoSage project roadmap for GSSoC '26! We want to build the ultimate AI developer tool, and to do that, we need features that completely change how developers work.

Starting today, we are officially opening up development for **Three Major Features**:

1. 🪄 **Auto-Remediation (One-Click Fixes):** Our PR bot won't just find bugs; it will automatically write the code to fix them via GitHub's "Suggested Changes".
2. 🧪 **Automated Unit Test Generator:** An AI tool that instantly writes full Jest/PyTest suites for your files.
3. 🔍 **Semantic Code Search:** Ask natural language questions like *"Where is the payment logic?"* and get instant answers from the codebase.

**How to get involved:**
I have just created official Issues for these features! If you are looking to make a high-impact, advanced contribution, head over to the Issues tab and claim one of these tasks. 

Let's build something developers can't live without! 🔥

---
⭐ **Support RepoSage!** If you find this project helpful, please consider giving us a **Star** 🌟 on GitHub! Your support helps us win GSSoC '26 and grow professionally!
